description: Regression yardstick for §22b homepage phases (15–22). Do not raise any counter without an accompanying REVAMP_PLAN.md entry explaining why.
notes: Phase 15 above-fold rebuild must preserve canonical + og:url (enforced by tests/seo-sitewide.test.js and scripts/node/check-seo-meta.js).
Phase 17 countUp parity and Phase 18 sparkline should not raise total JS bytes > 10% vs this baseline.
Phase 22 JS trim is the formal reconciliation of any temporary regressions.
